svg.text: one anyio.run · every stage async · OpenRouter → Anthropic · Qdrant hybrid retrieval

g.text: Sources · HN Algolia · Wayback · curated YAML · Crunchbase CSV
Fetch · httpx + SSRF guard · trafilatura strips nav / cookies
Extract + slop classifier · length floor · Haiku reject → quarantine/
LLM fan-out · facet + rerank-summary · 2 Haiku calls / doc
anyio.CapacityLimiter(20) · 1h cache (warmed by 1 sync call) · Tavily enrich
Embed · fastembed nomic-v1.5 dense (768d) + BM25 sparse
Entity resolution · domain → embed sim → Haiku tiebreak
journal=pending → md via os.replace → qdrant upsert → journal=complete
User pitch · slopmortem query "marketplace for industrial scrap metal"
server-side Reciprocal Rank Fusion → top 30 · no HyDE / no rewrite
llm_rerank · one Sonnet call · JSON schema → top 5
first call warms 1h cache (cache_creation_tokens>0) · fan out under CapacityLimiter(N)
consolidate_risks · Sonnet · merge paraphrases · ground in pitch
render · Report → Markdown · top risks · per-candidate · footer
